SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Admin
Represents an admin user with elevated privileges for managing events, users, and content.
AdminBrowseCommentsActivity
Admin screen that loads every comment from every event in a single list.
AdminBrowseEventsActivity
Activity that allows administrators to browse all events and remove events that violate application policies.
AdminBrowseImagesActivity
Activity that allows administrators to browse uploaded images associated with events.
AdminEventAdapter
RecyclerView adapter used by administrators to display events and perform moderation actions such as removing events.
AdminEventAdapter.OnEventActionListener
Interface used to notify the activity when an admin performs an action on an event.
AdminHubActivity
Central admin dashboard activity providing navigation to all admin management screens including event browsing, image browsing, organizer removal, and comment browsing.
AdminImageAdapter
RecyclerView adapter used to display images uploaded for events.
AdminImageAdapter.OnImageActionListener
Listener interface for image removal actions triggered by the admin.
AdminNotificationAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for displaying notification log entries in the admin view.
AdminNotificationLogsActivity
Admin screen that displays all notification logs across the system.
AdminOrganizerAdapter
RecyclerView adapter used to display organizers to administrators and allow them to remove organizers from the system.
AdminOrganizerAdapter.OnOrganizerActionListener
Listener interface for organizer removal actions triggered by the admin.
AdminRemoveOrganizersActivity
Activity that allows administrators to view organizers and remove those who violate application policies.
BrowseEventsActivity
Activity for browsing and filtering events with search, sort, and tag filtering.
Comment
Represents a single comment on an event.
CommentRepository
Repository for CRUD operations on event comments.
CommentRepository.CommentsCallback
 
CommentRepository.SimpleCallback
 
CommentsActivity
Displays the comment section for a specific event.
CreateEventActivity
Activity for creating a new event in the app.
CustomLogs
This is an abstract class that defines a custom log/list
Entrant
Model class that represents an entrant in the app.
EntrantLocation
Model storing an entrant's geographic coordinates for geolocation-required events.
EventAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for event cards, routing to organizer or entrant views based on role.
EventCarouselAdapter
ViewPager2 adapter that displays public events in a horizontal carousel.
EventDescriptionView
Activity that displays the details of a specific event and allows the user to join or leave the waitlist, and for organizers to view the waitlist.
EventHistoryActivity
Activity that displays the user's event registration history.
EventList
Displays a list of events using a custom log-based layout.
EventRepository
Repository for CRUD and waitlist operations on Event documents in Firestore.
EventRepository.CountCallback
Callback interface for fetching the number of entrants on a waitlist.
EventRepository.EntrantsCallback
Callback interface for fetching a list of entrants.
EventRepository.EventCallback
Callback interface for fetching a single event.
EventRepository.EventsCallback
Callback interface for fetching a list of events.
EventRepository.SimpleCallback
Callback interface for successful and failed operations.
EventRepository.WaitlistStatusCallback
Callback interface for checking if a user is on a waitlist.
Events
Represents an event in the event planner application.
EventTypeFragment
Dialog fragment that lets the user choose between creating a public or private event.
EventWaitlistActivity
Activity showing the waitlist for an event with join and leave functionality.
FragmentFinalEntrantList
Dialog showing the event waitlist with navigation to pending, selected, and cancelled entrant views.
FragmentPendingInvites
Shows entrants with pending invitations (status "invited", not yet accepted).
FragmentPostDrawWaitlist
Shows cancelled/declined entrants and allows the organizer to redraw replacements from the waiting list.
FragmentPreDrawWaitlist
Shows all entrants currently on the waitlist for an event, before the draw has taken place.
FragmentPrivateEventSetup
Setup dialog for creating a private event with registration dates, capacity, and tags.
FragmentPublicEventSetup
Setup dialog for creating a public event with registration dates, capacity, and tags.
FragmentSelectedEntrants
Dialog displaying all selected entrants (invited, accepted, or declined) for an event.
History
Displays historical log entries using a custom log-based layout.
HomePage
Main home screen with navigation bar and upcoming event notifications.
InvitationsActivity
Activity displaying pending invitations for the current user with event name and organizer.
InviteEntrantActivity
Activity allowing organizers to search for users and send event invitations.
InviteUserAdapter
RecyclerView adapter displaying users with an invite button for organizer use.
InviteUserAdapter.OnInviteClickListener
Listener interface for invite button clicks.
LocationRepository
Repository for reading and writing attendee location data.
LocationRepository.LocationsCallback
 
LocationRepository.SimpleCallback
 
MainActivity
Entry point of the app.
MapViewActivity
Activity displaying a Google Map with entrant location pins for an event.
MyCreatedEventsActivity
Activity listing all events created by the current user with status and visibility info.
NonAdminBrowseEvents
Browse screen for non-admin users to discover and filter public events.
Notification
Model representing a notification sent to a user about an event action.
NotificationHelper
Utility for showing heads-up system notifications for invitation events.
NotificationLogs
Notification screen controller for entrant invitation actions.
Organizer
Represents an organizer who can create and manage events.
PendingEntrantAdapter
Adapter for pending entrants list with a cancel button per row.
PendingEntrantAdapter.OnCancelClickListener
Listener interface for cancel actions on pending entrants.
PendingEntrantAdapter.ViewHolder
ViewHolder for a pending entrant row containing name, ID, and a cancel button.
Profile
Activity that displays the current user's profile information.
ProfileSettingsActivity
Activity that provides profile management settings for the current user.
ProfileSetup
Activity: New user sets up their profile Prompts user for their name, email, and phone number.
RegistrationRepository
Repository for event registration records in Firestore Supports join, leave, and invitation response flows.
RegistrationRepository.SimpleCallback
Callback for operations that only need to report success or failure.
SearchScreen
Activity for scanning QR codes to quickly navigate to an event page.
SettingsView
Activity that displays and allows editing of the user's profile settings.
User
Represents a user of the Event Planner application.
UserRepository
Repository for user profile persistence in Firestore.
UserRepository.SimpleCallback
Callback for operations that only need to report success or failure.
UserRepository.UserCallback
Callback for operations that return a single User.
UserRepository.UsersCallback
Callback for operations that return multiple User objects.
UserSettings
Model holding user preference settings such as notification toggles.
UserSettingsActivity
Activity displaying the user's profile settings with notification toggles and a delete-profile option.
WaitingList
Represents the waiting list for an event, maintaining a local list of object Entrant
WaitlistActivity
Activity displaying the waitlist for a specific event with real-time updates.
WaitlistAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for displaying entrant names and emails in a waitlist.
WaitlistAdapter.ViewHolder
ViewHolder for a waitlist entrant row containing name and ID/email.
